description: Hosted brand logo variants for seen. Each is the 'seen' wordmark. Fetch this manifest to choose the right file for a given background.

variants.name: obsidian
variants.useWhen: Self-contained dark badge. Drops onto any surface since it carries its own black background. Good default/primary.

variants.name: gold-transparent
variants.useWhen: Place on white or light backgrounds. Transparent, so it composites over any light surface.

variants.name: tan
variants.useWhen: Self-contained warm badge. Carries its own tan background.
